gates.name: Candidate Registry Gate
gates.notes: Candidate must be registered before release path.

gates.name: Reference Blueprint Gate
gates.notes: Must align with reference page blueprint.

gates.name: Content Quality Gate
gates.notes: Standard defined Sprint 14 (DEC-032). Public release and draft generation remain blocked until publisher dry-run harness and governance approval.

gates.name: Claim Source Traceability Gate
gates.notes: All material claims must be traceable.

gates.name: Source Scope Gate
gates.notes: Source scope must be defined and bounded.

gates.name: Route Link Integrity Gate
gates.notes: Route and internal links must pass integrity checks.

gates.name: Technical Quality Gate
gates.notes: Static technical quality must pass.

gates.name: Interface Governance Gate
gates.notes: No scanner/detector/scoring visual logic.

gates.name: Security Privacy Gate
gates.notes: Zero-data static security posture.

gates.name: Forbidden Language Gate
gates.notes: Adversarial language policy must pass.

gates.name: Sitemap Eligibility Gate
gates.notes: Sitemap entry only when route eligible.

gates.name: Human Governance Approval Gate
gates.notes: Explicit approval required.

gates.name: Final validate_all.py Gate
gates.notes: Canonical validation command must pass.

gates.name: Audit Record Gate
gates.notes: Sprint or release audit required.

gates.name: Structured Data and Semantic SEO Governance Gate
gates.notes: Standard defined Sprint 15 (DEC-033). Does not authorize publishing. Publisher remains blocked until first reference candidate pack.

gates.name: Publisher Dry-Run Harness Gate
gates.notes: Harness defined Sprint 16 (DEC-034). Does not authorize publishing, drafts, routes, or sitemap expansion by itself.

gates.name: First Reference Candidate Pack Gate
gates.notes: Pack defined Sprint 17 (DEC-035). Does not authorize publishing, drafts, routes, or sitemap expansion by itself.

gates.name: Reference Candidate Evaluation Gate
gates.notes: Evaluation defined Sprint 18 (DEC-036). Does not authorize publishing, drafts, routes, or sitemap expansion by itself.

gates.name: Internal Draft Blueprint Governance Gate
gates.notes: Blueprint governance defined Sprint 19 (DEC-037). Does not authorize publishing, drafts, routes, or sitemap expansion by itself.

gates.name: First Internal Draft Blueprint Pack Gate
gates.notes: Blueprint pack defined Sprint 20 (DEC-038). Does not authorize publishing, actual draft files, routes, or sitemap expansion by itself.

gates.name: First Internal Draft Pack Gate
gates.notes: Draft pack defined Sprint 21 (DEC-039). Does not authorize publishing, routes, sitemap expansion, or public metadata by itself.

gates.name: Internal Draft Review and Refinement Gate
gates.notes: Review and refinement defined Sprint 22 (DEC-040). Does not authorize publishing, routes, sitemap expansion, or public metadata by itself.

gates.name: Public Route Readiness Gate
gates.notes: Route readiness defined Sprint 23 (DEC-041). Does not authorize publishing, routes, sitemap expansion, public metadata, public navigation, deployment, classifier, tool, upload, or scoring by itself.

gates.name: First Controlled Public Reference Pilot Gate
gates.notes: Pilot defined Sprint 24 (DEC-042). Two controlled reference pages created. Does not authorize broader publication, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or monetization by itself.

gates.name: Public Reference Validation and Live Surface Audit Gate
gates.notes: Live surface audit defined Sprint 25 (DEC-043). Validates controlled reference pilot on GitHub Pages preview. Does not authorize broader publication, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or monetization by itself.

gates.name: Public Category Language Layer Gate
gates.notes: Category language layer defined Sprint 26 (DEC-044). One public language route created. Does not authorize engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or monetization by itself.

gates.name: Public Category Language Validation and Surface Audit Gate
gates.notes: Category language validation defined Sprint 27 (DEC-045). Validates /language/ surface without authorizing engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, API, forms, analytics, or monetization by itself.

gates.name: Evidence Posture Workbench Governance Gate
gates.notes: Workbench governance defined Sprint 28 (DEC-046). Defines input, output, state, and refusal models without authorizing interface, prototype, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, API, forms, analytics, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or monetization by itself.

gates.name: Evidence Posture Workbench Dry-Run Harness Gate
gates.notes: Workbench dry-run harness defined Sprint 29 (DEC-047). Tests governance behavior with fictional cases without authorizing interface, prototype, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, API, forms, analytics, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or monetization by itself.

gates.name: Evidence Posture Workbench Specification Layer Gate

Does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, API, forms, analytics, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or monetization by itself.
